caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I ON EVER DO SHIT", a matching green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. He is situated in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing shop, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and various pieces of clothing on racks in the background. The wall behind him is decorated with numerous framed photographs. Small logos are visible in the lower corners of the scene, including one that says "DON'T TELL". As the scene progresses, the man remains in a seated position, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head while speaking. His gaze fluctuates, looking forward and then slightly to the side as he continues to address the microphone.
